name: 03_single_holding_p_above_v
description: Single qualifying holding with last_price > vwap -> positive diff contribution.
derivation: SPY in live_vwaps; v=100.0 > 0. (p-v)/v = (105.0-100.0)/100.0 = 5.0/100.0 = 0.05. alloc*(p-v)/v = 1.0 * 0.05 = 0.05. valid_vwap_weight += 1.0. Final: (0.05, 1.0). Note 0.05 is exactly representable as a sum of binary fractions when computed as 5/100 here -- the test tolerance (rel=1e-9, abs=1e-12) absorbs any float drift.
